summary: Final manual + packaged-build smoke of live-stamp-write (proof-then-apply) PASSED. User confirmed the create-track inline flow works in Electron; 'Apply to Ableton' writes clips into the live Arrangement spanning to the next stamp; AbleSet reads them. Packaged .app build (electron:dist, signed, vendor/AbletonOSC bundled) + app-target e2e: 35/35 green. Two prior smoke failures (1-beat clips; window.prompt unsupported in Electron) were fixed and re-verified earlier this run.

criteria_results.text: Apply writes named clips into the Arrangement at correct beats
Clips span to the next stamp
criteria_results.notes: Fixed (stampsToClips length); live probe clip@4 length 8.

criteria_results.text: Create new +LYRICS track from the picker
criteria_results.notes: Inline input (window.prompt removed); user-confirmed working in Electron.

process_issues: Both smoke failures this run were Electron-only gaps invisible to the build-target e2e (Chromium): clip-length behavior and window.prompt. Recommend an Electron-target smoke (test:e2e:build is now wired and green) be part of pre-handoff verification for renderer/Electron-affecting changes.
